title: University Grants Commission (Recruitment) (Secretary, AS) (Amendment) Rules, 1983
text: UNIVERISTY OF GRANTS COMMISSION BAHADUR SHAH ZAFAR MARG NEW DELHI MINISTRY OF EDUCATION AND CULTURE (Department of Education) New Delhi 22nd September, 1983 NOTIFICATION CSR – In exercise of powers conferred by sub section (1) read with clause (d) of sub section (2) of section 25 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956, the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the University Grants Commission (Recruitment) Rules, 1983, namely: 1. Short title and commencement (1) These rules may be called the University Grants Commission (Recruitment) (Amendment) Rules, 1983. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. Amendment of the Schedule In the schedule to the University Grants Commission (Recruitment) Rules, 1983, for serial numbers 1 and 2 relating to the posts of Secretary and Additional Secretary respectively and entries relating thereto, the following shall be substitued, namely:– 71 -- 1 of 5 -- 72 Gazette Notifications THE SCHEDULE S. (Appointment will be made on a tenure basis for a term of five years renewable for on more term of five years both being subject to age of super- annuation as prescribed.) Note 1. Officers of the UGC who fulfill either of the above conditions will also be eligible for consideration. Note 2.
